scope: WooCommerce ShopBridge final quote checkout reliability

cases.trigger: merchant_quote_id is unknown or expires before checkout
cases.agent_action: discard approval/payment attempt, request a fresh final quote, and ask for approval again

cases.trigger: available WooCommerce stock minus active holds is lower than the quoted quantity
cases.agent_action: request a fresh final quote or choose another merchant/product before checkout

cases.trigger: current WooCommerce item line totals or subtotal no longer match the stored final quote
cases.agent_action: request a fresh final quote before approval and payment

cases.trigger: current WooCommerce shipping amount or selected method no longer matches the stored final quote
cases.agent_action: request a fresh final quote for the same delivery address before approval and payment

cases.trigger: current WooCommerce VAT lines no longer match the stored final quote
cases.agent_action: request a fresh final quote before approval and payment

cases.trigger: same idempotency key is retried after order creation
cases.agent_action: treat the replay response as the same order instead of creating a duplicate order

cases.trigger: a second checkout attempts to consume an already-used merchant_quote_id
cases.agent_action: fetch order status by the original order reference or request a fresh quote
